creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
The thing is in beta for ages and appears quite stable. Last
	I checked, ImageMagick's TIFF support relied on something beta-37
	specific, so the time is ripe...

	Also added handling for the NOPORTDOCS setting, in which case an
	alternative PLIST is used and configure is called with HTML=no.

Fix: 

ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/tiff34-b37-port.tar.gz
